name: Black Equation
short_description: A dark fantasy interactive book — a personal, choice-driven story born from depression, built entirely from words.
detailed_description:
A knight who falls for his enemy. A mage ready to burn herself for others. A drifter who can't stop running. 12 endings, 7 love stories, and choices that leave marks — romance that heals one character can destroy another. One playthrough won't be enough.

Black Equation is a dark fantasy interactive book — a text-based narrative game where every word matters, and every silence has meaning.

About the Story

In the medieval kingdom of Highgard, the greatest threat is not monsters or ancient curses, but the king himself. A ruler who despises his own people dares to challenge fate, defy the gods, and sacrifice what is most precious to him.

His goal is not salvation, but erasure — to destroy Highgard and seize the neighboring throne of Valtoria. As magic spreads like a slow poison and political intrigue tightens its grip, three lives are drawn into the coming collapse:

  • Yinyue — an impulsive young mage whose compassion often outweighs caution, willing to burn herself to save others.

  • William — a restless young man avoiding responsibility, torn between desire and duty, drifting until choice becomes unavoidable.

  • Charles — a loyal knight divided between honor and truth, quietly searching for love in a world hostile to honesty.

Love, loyalty, betrayal, and forbidden choices intertwine. But one question becomes impossible to ignore: what if Highgard’s destruction cannot be stopped — only understood?

Gameplay & Experience

Black Equation is a pure text-based experience designed for immersion. While the narrative drives forward, your choices define what is revealed, who survives in your memory, and how the world speaks to you.

  • A Dark Fantasy Adventure: Deep lore, psychological depth, and atmospheric storytelling.

  • Choice-Driven Narrative: Multiple endings and hidden paths that cannot be seen in a single playthrough.

  • Classical Art Integration: Discover hidden masterpieces of classical painting woven into the narrative.

  • Diverse Cast: LGBTQ+ characters and relationships developed naturally within the story.

  • Accessibility: Adjustable text and background colors (Dark/Light modes) for a comfortable reading experience.

A Personal Work

This story was written during a period of deep depression, not as a product, but as a lifeline. When the world felt unreachable, writing became the only language left — a way to speak honestly, quietly, and without masks.

Black Equation is that conversation, transformed into a world you can enter.

There is no fast action here. Only text, atmosphere, and choices. I am a solo developer, and this is a sincere, personal work — written to survive, to reflect, and to speak with the world through story rather than noise.

If you enjoy interactive fiction, visual novels, and stories shaped by lived experience rather than formulas, this may become a quiet place for you — for a few evenings, or longer.
